concerns.text: FR-008 mandates a sensitivity analysis for the convergence threshold (sweeping 10^-3 to 10^-5) and reporting variation in gamma. This requirement is not anchored to any User Story. US-3 covers analysis and regression but does not explicitly scope a sensitivity analysis of the convergence threshold itself. This creates a silent scope creep where a specific experimental procedure is mandated without a corresponding user goal or story.

SC-004 requires the sensitivity analysis of the convergence threshold to show 'minimal variation' in gamma. This success criterion is orphaned because it relies on FR-008, which itself has no anchoring User Story. Without a story defining the need for this specific robustness check, the success criterion lacks a foundational goal.

The 'Acceptance Scenarios' in US-2 contain broken prose and incomplete sentences (e.g., 'When the simulation runs for A set of independent seeds will be used...' and 'Given the A fixed runtime limit will be established...'). While the intent is clear, the text is grammatically broken and needs editing to be a valid specification.
